intent: Every field carries multiple validations spanning regex, range, cross-field, and async-shape rule kinds.
notes: Payment-method baseline: IBAN and BIC carry regex format rules; Amount carries range and decimal-precision rules; Confirm Amount carries a cross-field equality rule; Tax ID and IBAN carry async-shape rules ('server-side IBAN validation', 'tax-id checksum service'). Used to test that generators emit cases for every rule kind.
